mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.created_at >= CURRENT_DATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) today_production, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURRENT_DATE) DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) week_production, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(i.pending_count) FROM items i WHERE i.deleted_at IS NULL), 0) pending_inspection FROM item_units u WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.engineering_order_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN e.produced_quantity=0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) not_started, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN e.produced_quantity>0 AND (e.produced_quantity<e.expected_quantity OR e.qualified_quantity<e.expected_quantity) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) in_progress, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN e.produced_quantity>=e.expected_quantity AND e.qualified_quantity>=e.expected_quantity THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) completed, COALESCE(SUM(e.expected_quantity), 0) expected_quantity, COALESCE(SUM(LEAST(e.qualified_quantity, e.expected_quantity)), 0) completed_quantity FROM engineering_orders e WHERE e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.status>=2

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(u.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') production_date, COUNT(*) quantity FROM item_units u WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.engineering_order_id IS NOT NULL AND u.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(u.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY production_date
